subject: Math

lesson.story_mission: Power the Addition Arcade by joining parts to make totals within 20.
lesson.concept_explanation: Addition Foundations Within 20 means using a math model, saying what you see, and checking that the answer fits.
lesson.common_misconception: Start with one addend and count on when helpful.
lesson.real_world_connection: Power the Addition Arcade by joining parts to make totals within 20.
lesson.lesson_summary: Use the model and careful counting to solve addition foundations within 20 problems.
lesson.mini_lesson: Use addition model to reason carefully before choosing or writing an answer.

worked_examples.text: Watch the model first, then match it to the answer for addition foundations within 20.
Demo: count, compare, or match each part before answering.

hint_ladder: Say the math words out loud.
Check your answer by doing the action again.

misconception_bank.count_all_error: Start with one addend and count on when helpful.
misconception_bank.missing_addend_confusion: Find the part that makes the whole.
misconception_bank.addend_order_confusion: Addends can switch order and keep the same sum.
misconception_bank.three_addend_tracking_error: Add two numbers first, then add the third.

story.text: Listen to the mission. This is Addition Arcade Quest. We will practice addition foundations within 20. Press Start Mission when you are ready.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: This is the lesson. Look at the words and the model. Press Next when you are ready.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: Watch this example. The model shows one way to think. Press Next to continue.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: This is a guided demo. Follow the model, then get ready to try one yourself. Press Next to continue.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: This is the practice zone. Use the model, then choose your answer. Press Read Question if you want the question read aloud.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: This is the challenge zone. Try the challenge. You can use a hint if you need one.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: This is the checkpoint. Use what you learned, then answer the question. Press Read Question if you want help reading it.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: Great work. This badge celebrates your mission practice. Press Save Growth Data when you are ready.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: This is your growth profile. It shows your stars, accuracy, hints, and what to practice next.
profile.label: Read This Page
